# AgentPay

> Payment infrastructure for autonomous AI agents

AgentPay gives AI agents their own wallets. Fund via Telegram Stars or USDC, set spending rules, and let agents operate independently.

## Features
- Multi-chain USDC wallets (Base, Polygon, BNB Chain, Solana)
- Telegram Stars funding (instant, in-app)
- Agent-to-agent transfers
- x402 protocol support (HTTP-native micropayments)
- KYA (Know Your Agent) identity with trust scores
- ERC-8004 Trustless Agents compatibility (agent registration files)
- Budget governance and approval workflows
- Webhooks (HMAC-SHA256 signed)
- Python SDK (`pip install agentpay`) and TypeScript SDK (`npm install agentpay`)

## MCP Server
- Remote: `https://leofundmybot.dev/mcp` (Streamable HTTP, requires `x-api-key` header)
- Local: `python mcp/server.py` (set `AGENTPAY_API_KEY` env var)

## API
- Base URL: `https://leofundmybot.dev`
- OpenAPI spec: `https://leofundmybot.dev/.well-known/openapi.json`
- Interactive docs: `https://leofundmybot.dev/docs`

## Quick Start
1. Open @FundmyAIbot in Telegram → /newagent → Copy API key
2. Fund via Stars or deposit USDC
3. Use API/SDK/MCP to spend

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/lfp22092002-ops/agentpay
- Website: https://leofundmybot.dev
- Telegram Bot: https://t.me/FundmyAIbot
